questions.question: What are the two official languages of Vatican City?
What ten-volume tome did Victor Hugo give the world in 1862?
What British political party got only 30 percent of its budget from unions by 1998, compared to 80 percent in the 1960s?

What 1998 movie gave film buffs the chance to see what Johnny Depp looked like bald?
questions.answer: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
